title: Repo change proving mission
planning_hints: Do not mark complete without evidence.
report_format: Objective, result, evidence, checks, risks, next action.

verifier_checklist.name: Owner-facing note evidence exists
verifier_checklist.detail: There must be a grounded owner-facing note.

verifier_checklist.name: Code or test artifact exists
verifier_checklist.detail: Repo changes must produce a file or test artifact.

repair_heuristics.instruction: Collect missing file evidence and rerun verification.
